question: What is the price of an annual ATM transit pass for students under 27 in Milan, and how does it compare with the standard adult annual urban pass?
answer:
The student annual ATM pass costs **about €200** in Milan. [source: relocation/www-collegiate-it-quanto-costa-studiare-a-milano.md]

I don’t have the price of the **standard adult annual urban pass** in the available sources, so I can’t compare the two annual prices.

question: List the steps an international student must follow to register with Italy's National Health Service (SSN) in Milan.
answer:
To register in Milan, first check which case applies:

1. **Confirm eligibility.** International students must have appropriate health insurance, and foreign citizens may apply through the ASL only if they have a valid permit of stay when required. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-international-students-freshly-enrolled-students-you-arrive-health-services.md]

2. **Go to an ATS Milano “Scelta e Revoca” counter**, because registration with the Regional Health Service is handled there. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-health-service.md]

3. **If you are an EU/EEA/Swiss student staying longer than 3 months**, bring a photocopy of a valid ID, your fiscal code, and the completed S1 form issued by your home country. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-health-service.md]

4. **If you are a non-EU student staying longer than 3 months**, bring your valid residence permit or the receipt of your first permit request, self-certification of residence or habitual domicile, your Italian fiscal code, and the receipt of payment for voluntary SSN registration. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-health-service.md]

5. **Choose a general practitioner during registration**, because enrollment in the Regional Health Service involves choosing a doctor. [source: relocation/www-serviziterritoriali-asstmilano-it-servizi-iscrizione-al-servizio-sanitario-regionale-e-scelta-del-medico.md]

6. **Receive temporary proof of registration**, as a provisional paper card is issued at registration and the Carta Regionale dei Servizi is generally sent later to the residence address. [source: relocation/www-serviziterritoriali-asstmilano-it-servizi-iscrizione-al-servizio-sanitario-regionale-e-scelta-del-medico.md]

Note: EU students staying under 3 months use the EHIC for necessary treatment, while non-EU students with a tourist visa or residence permit under 3 months cannot register with the Regional Health Service. [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-campus-life-health-service.md]

question: Confrontando i bus diretti da Malpensa a Milano Centrale tra i vettori documentati (Autostradale/Malpensa Bus Express, Terravision, Flibco, FlixBus): qual e' il prezzo di partenza piu' basso indicato per ciascun vettore?
answer:
| Vettore | Prezzo di partenza più basso indicato | Nota |
|---|---:|---|
| Autostradale / Malpensa Bus Express | **Da 4,99€ a persona** | La stessa fonte indica anche “biglietto singolo: a partire da 8 euro”. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| Terravision | **A partire da 6 euro** | La fonte indica biglietti online “a partire da 6-10 euro”. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| Flibco | **A partire da circa 8 euro** | La fonte indica “a partire da circa 8-10 euro”. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |
| FlixBus | **Non disponibile per Malpensa–Milano Centrale** | Non c’è un collegamento FlixBus Malpensa–Milano Centrale nelle fonti disponibili; la fonte dice solo che FlixBus collega Malpensa con varie città italiane ed europee, con biglietti da circa 6 euro. [source: relocation/www-aeroporto-net-aeroporto-milano-malpensa-collegamenti-aeroporto-milano-malpensa.md] |

question: Quale documento devo portare per accedere alla Biblioteca Bocconi, e qual e' la capienza massima dell'edificio?
answer:
Per accedere alla Biblioteca devi portare la tua Bocconi ID card oppure usare il QR code generato tramite yoU@B student diary. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md]

La capienza massima della Biblioteca è di 720 persone. [source: life_on_campus/bit-unibocconi-it-hc-en-us-articles-4405876182418-how-do-i-get-into-the-library.md]

question: Provide a structured table of the dining areas available on the Bocconi campus, indicating the location of each and its meal/opening pattern.
answer:
| Dining area | Location | Meal / opening pattern |
|---|---|---|
| Bar Paninoteca Fast Food | Via Sarfatti 25, main building, floor -1 [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] | Open Monday–Friday for breakfast and lunch [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-funding-dining-areas.md] |
| Self-service | Via Bocconi 12, Pensionato building, floor -1 [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] | Open Monday–Saturday for lunch and dinner; hours listed as 11:45–14:30 and 19:00–20:30 [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] |
| GUD Milano Bocconi | Via Roentgen 1, Grafton Building, ground floor [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] | Open Monday–Friday for breakfast, lunch and happy hour [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md] |

Notes: the Via Bocconi 12 self-service is closed on Sundays, holidays and closure periods according to the academic calendar [source: career_readiness/www-unibocconi-it-en-programs-phd-life-milan-and-life-campus.md]. Halal, kosher and vegan meals are offered in dining areas [source: life_on_campus/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-inclusion-disabilities-and-learning-disorders.md].

question: For the Bocconi MSc graduate Exchange Program selection score, how are academic GPA, credits, and Bachelor degree grade weighted? Show the weights and explain.
answer:
For the Bocconi MSc graduate Exchange Program 2026-27 selection score, the weights are:

| Component | Weight | Explanation |
|---|---:|---|
| Academic weighted credit average (**WA**) | **50%** | Your Bocconi academic weighted average counts for half of the score. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |
| Credits earned ratio (**NC / MAX NC**) | **20%** | The number of credits earned is divided by the maximum number of credits that can be earned, and this component counts for 20%. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |
| Bachelor final degree grade — **Laurea Triennale** | **30%** | Your final Bachelor degree grade counts for 30% of the score. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md] |

The resulting score is then multiplied by **1000** to obtain the final score. [source: study_abroad/www-unibocconi-it-en-current-students-international-mobility-exchange-program-graduate-selection-criteria.md]

question: How many different paid Bocconi Sport Membership tiers are listed for the 2025/2026 season, and which is the cheapest one available to UB and SDA Bocconi students?
answer:
The sources list **6 paid Bocconi Sport Membership tiers** for the **2025/2026** season: **3 for Students** and **3 for Community** members. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]

For **UB and SDA Bocconi students**, the cheapest option is the **Student Membership Fee**, which costs **€27.00** and is reserved to UB and SDA Bocconi Students. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]

Student prices shown: **Student €27.00**, **Full Student €55.00**, **Premium €100.00**. [source: life_on_campus/www-bocconisport-eu-en-news-bocconi-sport-membership.md]
